description: Configure advanced paragraph style definitions to automate the formatting of a City Council meeting transcript using the raw text in /home/ga/Documents/council_minutes_raw.odt. Create a custom Paragraph Style named 'Speaker Label' with Bold font, 6pt Spacing Above Paragraph, 'Keep with next paragraph' enabled, and 'Minute Text' as the Next Style. Create a custom Paragraph Style named 'Minute Text' with a 0.5 inch (1.27 cm) Left Indent, Regular font, and 'Speaker Label' as the Next Style. Apply 'Speaker Label' to all speaker names (lines ending in ':') and 'Minute Text' to all dialogue paragraphs. Save the formatted document to /home/ga/Documents/council_minutes_formatted.odt.
